ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The text of the quote. Required.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Book, speech, talk - anything that helps you find it later.
ast.target: 可选。书籍、演讲、谈话——任何有助于你日后查找的内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 用逗号分隔。前导 # 可选。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative folder paths to scan for quotes, one per line. Leave blank to scan the entire vault.
ast.target: 要扫描引文的、相对于保险库的文件夹路径，每行一个。留空则扫描整个保险库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: New quotes added with the add quote command are appended to this file (created if missing).
ast.target: 使用添加引文命令添加的新引文将追加到此文件（如果不存在则创建）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only show quotes that have an author. “clio-quote” blocks need a non-empty “author:” field; bare blockquotes need an “— author” attribution line. Quotes without attribution are skipped by the daily and random pickers.
ast.target: 仅显示有作者的引文。“clio-quote”代码块需要非空的“author:”字段；裸引用块需要“— 作者”归属行。每日和随机选取器会跳过没有归属的引文。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What counts as a quote when scanning your notes. “clio-quote” code blocks are always indexed; this setting picks what else gets scooped up.
ast.target: 扫描笔记时，什么算作引文。“clio-quote”代码块始终被索引；此设置决定还会收录哪些其他内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Re-scan the configured folders. Run this if quotes look stale.
ast.target: 重新扫描已配置的文件夹。如果引文看起来过时，请运行此操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Look up the daily word at api.dictionaryapi.dev for definitions and example sentences. Disable to use the word list offline only.
ast.target: 在 api.dictionaryapi.dev 查询每日单词的定义和例句。禁用则仅使用离线词表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When you skip a word, never show it again. Turn off to let dismissed words come back.
ast.target: 当你跳过一个单词时，不再显示它。关闭此选项可让已忽略的单词重新出现。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When on, only words from the custom list below are used. When off, custom words are added to the built-in list.
ast.target: 开启时，仅使用下方自定义列表中的单词。关闭时，自定义单词将添加到内置列表中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pick a different word for today without dismissing the current one.
ast.target: 为今天选择一个不同的单词，而不忽略当前单词。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Save each day's word so the word-recap card has data to show. History is stored locally in this plugin's data file.
ast.target: 保存每天的单词，以便单词回顾卡片有数据可显示。历史记录存储在此插件的数据文件中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Both Wikipedia cards (on this day, today's featured article) share a single Wikimedia request per day. The featured article is text-only - images from Wikipedia are intentionally never displayed.
ast.target: 两张维基百科卡片（历史上的今天、今日精选文章）每天共享一个维基媒体请求。精选文章仅限文本——故意不显示维基百科的图片。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Master switch for any call to api.wikimedia.org. Disable to keep the plugin fully offline.
ast.target: 对 api.wikimedia.org 任何调用的主开关。禁用可使插件完全离线。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When you skip an on-this-day event, never show it again. Turn off to let dismissed events come back.
ast.target: 当你跳过一个历史上的今天事件时，不再显示它。关闭此选项可让已忽略的事件重新出现。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Cycle to the next event in today's curated list, without dismissing the current one.
ast.target: 切换到今天策划列表中的下一个事件，而不忽略当前事件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pull Wikipedia's featured article of the day (text only - the article's image is intentionally not shown). Insert a `featured-article` code block to display it. Off by default.
ast.target: 拉取维基百科的今日精选文章（仅限文本——故意不显示文章图片）。插入 `featured-article` 代码块以显示它。默认关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A short, open question to journal with each day. Insert a `prompt-of-the-day` code block to display today's prompt.
ast.target: 每天一个简短的开放式问题，用于日记。插入 `prompt-of-the-day` 代码块以显示今日提示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: One prompt per line. Added to the built-in list (or used alone if you replace it below).
ast.target: 每行一个提示。添加到内置列表中（或如果在下方替换则单独使用）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When on, only your custom prompts are used. When off, your prompts are added to the built-in pool.
ast.target: 开启时，仅使用你的自定义提示。关闭时，你的提示将添加到内置提示池中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When you skip a prompt, never show it again. Turn off to let dismissed prompts come back.
ast.target: 当你跳过一个提示时，不再显示它。关闭此选项可让已忽略的提示重新出现。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A single short line per day, stored locally in Clio's data file. Insert a `one-line-journal` code block to write today's entry and (optionally) see entries from the same day in past years.
ast.target: 每天一行简短记录，本地存储在 Clio 的数据文件中。插入 `one-line-journal` 代码块以撰写今日条目，并（可选）查看过去几年同一天的条目。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used by the `vault-on-this-day` block to find past daily notes whose filename matches today's calendar day. Match these to your existing daily-notes plugin settings.
ast.target: `vault-on-this-day` 代码块使用此设置来查找文件名与今天日历日期匹配的过去每日笔记。请将其与你现有的每日笔记插件设置相匹配。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative folder to scan. Leave blank to scan the entire vault.
ast.target: 要扫描的、相对于保险库的文件夹。留空则扫描整个保险库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Supported tokens: yyyy, yy, mm, m, dd, d. Default: yyyy-mm-dd.
ast.target: 支持的标记：yyyy, yy, mm, m, dd, d。默认：yyyy-mm-dd。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A pure-local card showing tonight's moon phase and (with a location set) today's sunrise, sunset, and day length. Off by default.
ast.target: 一张纯本地卡片，显示今晚的月相以及（设置位置后）今天的日出、日落和日照时长。默认关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable to make the `sky-today` code block render. Always works offline.
ast.target: 启用以使 `sky-today` 代码块渲染。始终离线工作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used to derive your sunrise / sunset coordinates. All data stays local.
ast.target: 用于推导你的日出/日落坐标。所有数据保持本地。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: The unexamined life is not worth living.
ast.target: 未经审视的人生不值得一过。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Path to a folder, one per line

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [clio] 维基百科订阅源获取失败

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [clio] 历史上的今天渲染失败

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [clio] 库历史上的今天渲染失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not save quote. See console for details.
ast.target: 无法保存引文。详情请查看控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Skipped. A new word has been selected.

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在显示不同的历史事件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 已跳过。正在显示不同的事件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在扫描库中的引用块引文…

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No blockquote quotes found. Either everything is already converted or there are no blockquotes in scope.
ast.target: 未找到引用块引文。要么所有内容都已转换，要么范围内没有引用块。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No intentions configured. Add some in the plugin settings.
ast.target: 未配置任何意图。请在插件设置中添加一些。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 已跳过。正在显示新单词。

ast.name: blockquotes
ast.target: clio-quote 块 + 普通引用块

ast.name: both
ast.target: clio-quote 块 + 引用块 + 标注

ast.name: name
ast.target: 波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那

ast.name: name
ast.target: 圣文森特和格林纳丁斯

ast.name: name
ast.source: Copy quote of the day to clipboard
ast.target: 复制每日引言到剪贴板

ast.name: name
ast.target: 插入“历史上的今天”区块

ast.name: name
ast.target: 复制历史事件到剪贴板

ast.name: name
ast.target: 插入知识库历史事件区块

ast.name: name
ast.source: Convert blockquote quotes to structured blocks
ast.target: 将引用块引言转换为结构化区块

ast.name: text
ast.target: 引言区块需要一个“quote:”字段。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No words available. Add some in settings.
ast.target: 无可用词汇。请在设置中添加一些。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No definition available - try the dictionary online.
ast.target: 无可用定义 - 请尝试在线词典。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Could not load today's on-this-day event.
ast.target: 无法加载今日历史事件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Could not load today's featured article.
ast.target: 无法加载今日精选文章。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 正在获取今日精选文章…

ast.name: text
ast.source: No intentions set yet. Add up to four in the plugin settings.
ast.target: 尚未设置意图。请在插件设置中添加最多四个。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No prompts available. Add custom prompts in Muse settings.
ast.target: 没有可用的提示。请在 Muse 设置中添加自定义提示。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Could not scan the vault for past notes.
ast.target: 无法扫描保险库以查找过去的笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Pick your country in the plugin settings for sun times
ast.target: 请在插件设置中选择您的国家以获取日出日落时间

ast.name: text
ast.source: No history yet. Enable “Track word-of-the-day history” in Muse settings to start collecting your past words.
ast.target: 暂无历史记录。请在 Muse 设置中启用“追踪每日一词历史”以开始收集您过去的词汇。

ast.name: text
ast.target: clio-static 块需要一个 \"type:\" 字段。

ast.name: text
ast.target: clio-static 引用需要一个 \"text:\" 字段。

ast.name: text
ast.target: clio-static 单词需要一个 \"word:\" 字段。

ast.name: text
ast.target: clio-static 事实需要一个 \"text:\" 字段。

ast.name: text
ast.target: clio-static 文章需要一个 \"title:\" 字段。

ast.name: text
ast.target: clio-static 提示需要一个 \"text:\" 字段。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No intentions configured. Add some in Settings → Clio.
ast.target: 未配置任何意图。请在设置 → Clio 中添加一些。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 没有可显示的往年条目。
